case_title: CHELSEY AKAY ET AL VS. MARCELLE ERDOZAINCY

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00 SERVED DEC-20-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ERDOZAINCY, MARCELLE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,600.00 FILED BY AKAY, CHELSEY AKAY, ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT ERDOZAINCY, MARCELLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-19-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-19-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-19-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-19-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AKAY, CHELSEY AKAY, ALEXANDER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ERDOZAINCY, MARCELLE $950.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,050.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
